title: Complexity Policy and Preflight
outOfScope: Silently activating a proposed complexity policy
Removing the enforced Preflight Human Decision Gate
Changing product code or project-specific quality policy

sources.reason: WI08 policy proposal and Preflight activation target.
English Preflight and human decision gate contract.
Japanese Preflight and human decision gate contract.
Current evidence-derived readiness and decision gate implementation.
Complexity policy limits and repayment enforcement.
Reviewable complexity maximums, baseline, and repayment records.
Readiness, human decision, and fail-closed Preflight tests.

riskAssessment.reason: Policy activation is decision-sensitive; stale or incomplete proposal evidence must block rather than silently allow.

executionDecision.reason: User authorized the serial remediation plan and complete Work Item lifecycle.

preReviewWarnings: Policy proposals remain inactive until explicit human decision evidence matches the current Contract and Preflight hash.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: Complexity policy proposals remain reviewable and inactive until explicit human confirmation; stale/missing decision evidence keeps the Preflight gate blocked.
Budget increases require a matching repayment record with owner, due date, previous/current values, and rationale; unrecorded increases fail closed.
Recomputed Preflight after policy or Contract changes invalidates prior decision evidence and requires a fresh decision or ready evidence.
Focused tests cover proposal, confirmation, stale decision, missing repayment, and valid repayment paths.
English and Japanese Cockpit documentation describes the policy proposal and re-Preflight boundary.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: Complexity budgets and Preflight decisions can drift when a policy maximum is changed without a proposal/confirmation boundary or when old decision evidence is reused after the Contract changes.
constraints: Keep the enforced Preflight gate and fail closed on missing, stale, or contradictory evidence.
Require a repayment record for every policy budget increase.
Do not treat human decision metadata as proof that an underlying complexity or quality check passed.
Use standard-library implementation and preserve existing Contract/Summary/archive schemas.
intent.rationale: Binding policy changes and decisions to fresh evidence makes complexity governance reviewable without turning approval metadata into a false pass signal.

rawUserRequest: 先走完当前文档的流程。用户已授权按计划逐工单执行，包含修改代码、测试、文档、PR、合并、ai-close-work-item、分支清理；妄想测试失败继续修改。

declaredIntent.summary: Enforce complexity policy proposal, repayment, and fresh Preflight decision evidence.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: policy proposal or increase without repayment remains blocked
stale or missing Preflight decision evidence cannot activate policy
fresh matching evidence permits only the explicitly selected safe continuation

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized governance code, tests, documentation, PR, merge, archive, close, and branch cleanup.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
